loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

text1.text: คณะกรรมการ

meet_no2.text: ประชุมครั้งที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name as coop_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name as manager_name ,(select president_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as president_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date as loan_requestment_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) loan_requestment_date_tdate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no as membership_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no as member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name as member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control as member_group_control_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate ,'!text1_1!' as text1 ,'!meet_no2!' as meet_no2 , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code where sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code ) as grade ,sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status as marriage_status ,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as AGE_LIFE_TEXT ,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as age_mem_text ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date as approve_date , decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ,'1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename
where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,' ' ) as spouse_name
, ( select sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as spouse_salary_amount
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthdep as monthdep ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthloan as monthloan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare as monthshare ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.balance_salary as balance_salary ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount as salary_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value as share_stock ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare as share_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.req_contract_period as req_contract_period ,nvl(( select sum( item_amount )
from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '11' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as academic_amount
,nvl((select sum(item_amount)from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.item_code = '34' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no),0) as send_drop
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '12' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as remuneration_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit as max_loan_permit ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount as mem_request_amount
,nvl((select sum((principal_balance_of_loan + interest_amount + sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount)) from sc_lon_m_loan_history ,sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' or sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1' ),0) as sum_history
, ( select max( last_period ) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where clear_target = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as last_period
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount as period_payment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share as buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description as loan_type_description
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_inc_amount /*รายได้*/
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_exp_amount /*รายจ่าย*/
,mem_request_amount - total_old_loan - total_oldint - fee_amount - buy_share as paid_amount /*รับจริง*/ ,monthdep + monthloan + monthshare as monthly
,nvl(( select sum( payment_amount ) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' ),0) as payment_amount ,'' slip_balance ,FPA_KEP_PAID_BY_MEM( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as PAID_BY_MEM ,FPB_AMN_REQ_DIFF( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as DIFF_LOAN
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_lon_m_contract
WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '65พ000013'

r_amnat_ca_req_from_special_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type, (select sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name from sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type ) as fee_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee where 1 = 1 /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = {0}

r_amnat_ca_req_from_special_nest_history.sql:
SELECT (principal_balance_of_loan + interest_amount) as total_clr, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_type
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history WHERE 1 = 1 and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0}
